# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read

env:
  BUILD_DIR: build
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 14

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    name: Validate Build Context
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      safe_ref_name: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.ref_name }}
      safe_sha: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Sanitize and validate ref name
        id: sanitize
        run: |
          REF_NAME="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          SHA="${GITHUB_SHA}"

          if ! echo "${REF_NAME}" | grep -qE '^[a-zA-Z0-9._/-]+$'; then
            echo "::error::Invalid ref name detected: contains disallowed characters"
            exit 1
          fi

          if ! echo "${SHA}" | grep -qE '^[a-f0-9]{40}$'; then
            echo "::error::Invalid SHA format detected"
            exit 1
          fi

          SAFE_REF=$(echo "${REF_NAME}" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g' | cut -c1-64)

          echo "ref_name=${SAFE_REF}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "sha=${SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

  build:
    name: Build Application
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.sha }}
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Set up build environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Verify dependency integrity
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm audit --audit-level=high || true

      - name: Run security linting
        run: |
          npx --yes lockfile-lint --path package-lock.json --type npm --allowed-hosts npm --validate-https

      - name: Build application
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
          CI: true
        run: |
          npm run build --if-present

          mkdir -p "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/bin"
          mkdir -p "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/config"
          mkdir -p "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/scripts"

          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            cp -r dist/* "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/bin/"
          fi

          if [ -d "config" ]; then
            for f in config/*.example config/*.defaults config/*.schema.json; do
              [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/config/"
            done
          fi

          if [ -d "deploy" ]; then
            cp deploy/*.sh "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/scripts/" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

      - name: Strip secrets and sensitive data from artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Scanning build artifacts for sensitive data patterns..."

          SENSITIVE_PATTERNS='(password|secret|api[_-]?key|token|private[_-]?key|credentials|aws_access|aws_secret)'

          FOUND_SECRETS=false
          while IFS= read -r -d '' file; do
            if grep -qiE "${SENSITIVE_PATTERNS}" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
              echo "::warning::Potential sensitive data found in: ${file}"
              FOUND_SECRETS=true
            fi
          done < <(find "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}" -type f -print0)

          if [ "$FOUND_SECRETS" = true ]; then
            echo "::error::Build artifacts contain potential secrets. Review and remove before distribution."
            exit 1
          fi

          find "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}" -name "*.env" -delete
          find "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}" -name "*.pem" -delete
          find "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}" -name "*.key" -delete
          find "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}" -name ".env*" -delete
          find "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}" -name "*.p12" -delete
          find "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}" -name "*.pfx" -delete

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/BUILD_MANIFEST.json" << EOF
          {
            "version": "1.0.0",
            "build_number": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "build_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.safe_sha }}",
            "branch": "${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.safe_ref_name }}",
            "build_timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "runner_os": "${{ runner.os }}",
            "triggered_by": "github_actions"
          }
          EOF

      - name: Generate checksums for integrity verification
        run: |
          cd "${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}"
          find . -type f ! -name 'SHA256SUMS' -print0 | sort -z | xargs -0 sha256sum > SHA256SUMS
          echo "Build artifact checksums:"
          cat SHA256SUMS

      - name: Upload compiled binaries
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: compiled-binaries-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/bin/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: config-files-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/config/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deploy-scripts-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/scripts/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Upload build manifest and checksums
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-metadata-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: |
            ${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/BUILD_MANIFEST.json
            ${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/SHA256SUMS
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload complete build bundle
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: complete-build-${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.safe_ref_name }}-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

  verify-artifacts:
    name: Verify Build Artifacts
    needs: [validate-inputs, build]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: read
    steps:
      - name: Download complete build bundle
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: complete-build-${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.safe_ref_name }}-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: verified-build/

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          cd verified-build

          if [ ! -f "SHA256SUMS" ]; then
            echo "::error::SHA256SUMS file missing from artifacts"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [ ! -f "BUILD_MANIFEST.json" ]; then
            echo "::error::BUILD_MANIFEST.json missing from artifacts"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "Verifying checksums..."
          if sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS; then
            echo "All artifact checksums verified successfully"
          else
            echo "::error::Artifact integrity check failed - checksums do not match"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Verify no secrets in downloaded artifacts
        run: |
          SENSITIVE_PATTERNS='(password|secret|api[_-]?key|token|private[_-]?key|credentials|aws_access|aws_secret)'

          FOUND=false
          while IFS= read -r -d '' file; do
            if file "$file" | grep -q "text"; then
              if grep -qiE "${SENSITIVE_PATTERNS}" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
                echo "::error::Sensitive data pattern found in verified artifact: ${file}"
                FOUND=true
              fi
            fi
          done < <(find verified-build/ -type f ! -name 'SHA256SUMS' -print0)

          if [ "$FOUND" = true ]; then
            echo "::error::Verified artifacts contain potential secrets"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "Security scan passed - no sensitive data patterns detected"

      - name: Print download instructions
        run: |
          echo "============================================="
          echo "  BUILD ARTIFACTS AVAILABLE FOR DOWNLOAD"
          echo "============================================="
          echo ""
          echo "Build Number: ${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "Branch: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.safe_ref_name }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.safe_sha }}"
          echo ""
          echo "Available artifacts:"
          echo "  - compiled-binaries-${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "  - config-files-${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "  - deploy-scripts-${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "  - build-metadata-${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "  - complete-build-${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.safe_ref_name }}-${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo ""
          echo "Download from: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo ""
          echo "IMPORTANT: Verify SHA256SUMS after downloading"
          echo "  cd <download_dir> && sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS"
          echo "============================================="
